### 2. Android Settings Page -- Buttons/Controls and Their Implementation Status

#### Section: "通用" (General)

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 1 | **"跟随系统" (Follow System)** | Toggle Switch | PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saves to SharedPreferences (`follow_system` key). When enabled, it also clears `darkMode`. However, the setting is NEVER consumed: `EasyTierTheme()` in HomePage.kt always uses the default `isSystemInDarkTheme()` parameter. The user's preference is stored but has zero visible effect on the app. |
| 2 | **"深色模式" (Dark Mode)** | Toggle Switch (conditional, shown only when "跟随系统" is off) | PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saves to SharedPreferences (`dark_mode` key). Same critical gap: it is never passed to `EasyTierTheme()`. The theme composable in `Theme.kt` accepts a `darkTheme: Boolean` parameter, but `HomePage.kt` calls it as `EasyTierTheme()` with no arguments, so it always uses the system default. The toggle saves the value but it does nothing. |
| 3 | **"开机自启" (Start on Boot)** | Toggle Switch | NOT FUNCTIONAL -- Saves to SharedPreferences, but there is **no `BroadcastReceiver` for `BOOT_COMPLETED`** anywhere in the Android app. The `AndroidManifest.xml` does not declare the `RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED` permission, nor does it register any boot receiver. The setting is purely decorative. |

#### Section: "网络" (Network)

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 4 | **"自动回连" (Auto Reconnect)** | Toggle Switch | NOT FUNCTIONAL -- Saves to SharedPreferences (`auto_reconnect` key). Neither `EasyTierService.kt` nor `EasyTierVpnService.kt` reference `SettingsRepository` or this setting at all. No reconnect logic reads this value. |

#### Section: "通知" (Notifications)

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 5 | **"连接成功通知" (Connect Success Notification)** | Toggle Switch | NOT FUNCTIONAL -- Saves to SharedPreferences. Neither `EasyTierService.kt` nor `EasyTierVpnService.kt` reference `SettingsRepository` or show any notifications. The app has no consumer of this setting anywhere. |
| 6 | **"断开连接通知" (Disconnect Notification)** | Toggle Switch | NOT FUNCTIONAL -- Identical situation to #5. |

#### Section: "日志" (Logs)

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 7 | **"日志级别" (Log Level)** | Dropdown (debug/info/warn/error) | PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saves to SharedPreferences. However, no log filtering code reads this value. The `LogService.kt` collects all log entries; the `LogPage.kt` displays all of them with no level-based filtering. |
| 8 | **"查看运行日志" (View Running Logs)** | Clickable List Item with chevron | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Calls `onNavigateToLog?.invoke()`, which is wired in `HomePage.kt` (line 138: `onNavigateToLog = { showLogPage = true }`) to show the `LogPage` composable. The log page itself has working features: copy-to-clipboard, auto-scroll toggle, and clear. |

| 11 | **"后端" (Backend)** | Info Row (read-only) | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Displays hardcoded "EasyTier JNI". |

#### Bottom Action

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 12 | **"清除所有数据" (Clear All Data)** | Destructive Text Button | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Shows an `AppDialog` confirmation dialog. On confirm, calls `repo.clearAll()` which wipes all SharedPreferences, then resets all local state variables to defaults. |

---

### 3. Qt Settings Page -- Buttons/Controls and Their Implementation Status

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 1 | **"关闭时隐藏到托盘" (Hide to Tray on Close)** | CheckBox | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saved to/loaded from JSON file (`settings2.json`). Has dedicated signal `hideOnTrayChanged(bool)`. Static accessor `isHideOnTray()` for external consumers. |
| 2 | **"自动回连" (Auto Reconnect)** | CheckBox | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Save/load cycle complete. Static accessor `isAutoReconnect()` available. |
| 3 | **"自动检查更新" (Auto Check Updates)** | CheckBox | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Save/load cycle complete. Static accessor `isAutoCheckUpdate()` available. |
| 4 | **"开机自启" (Start on Boot)** | CheckBox | FULLY IMPLEMENTED with actual OS-level code. On **Windows**: uses `schtasks.exe` to create/delete a scheduled task that runs on login with highest privileges. On **Linux**: creates/deletes a `.desktop` file in `~/.config/autostart/` following the freedesktop.org spec. On other platforms: returns false (not supported). Has error handling: if `setAutoStart()` fails, the checkbox reverts to its previous state and the save is aborted. |
| 5 | **Version Label** | Read-only Label | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Shows `PROJECT_VERSION`, `IS_BETA_VERSION` flag, and `ET_VERSION` (EasyTier FFI version). |
| 6 | **"检查更新" (Check Update)** | Push Button | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Makes an HTTP GET request to the Gitee API (`https://gitee.com/api/v5/repos/myqfeng/qt-easy-tier/releases/latest`). 10-second timeout. Compares `tag_name` against `PROJECT_VERSION`. If newer version found, shows "Yes/No" dialog that opens browser to the releases page. Error handling for network failures, timeouts, and cancelled operations. |
| 7 | **"保存" (Save)** | Push Button | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saves all four checkbox states to JSON file, emits `settingsChanged()` and `hideOnTrayChanged()` signals. Shows success `QMessageBox`. Only enabled when `hasUnsavedChanges()` is true. |
| 8 | **"丢弃" (Discard)** | Push Button | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Reverts all checkboxes to `m_lastSaved*` values. Only enabled when `hasUnsavedChanges()` is true. |

---

### 4. TODO/FIXME Comments and Incomplete Implementations

**No TODO, FIXME, HACK, or XXX comments were found** in any of the settings-related files (both Android Kotlin and Qt C++). There are no explicit markers of known incomplete work.

However, there are significant **silent gaps** (unmarked incomplete/broken features):

**Android:**
- The entire dark mode / theme system is wired for save but not for application -- `EasyTierTheme()` in `HomePage.kt` never reads the settings. This is essentially a dead code path.
- `startOnBoot`, `autoReconnect`, `notifyOnConnect`, and `notifyOnDisconnect` all save to SharedPreferences but have zero consumers anywhere in the app. Neither the foreground service (`EasyTierService.kt`) nor the VPN service (`EasyTierVpnService.kt`) references `SettingsRepository` at all.
- No `BOOT_COMPLETED` broadcast receiver exists. The `startOnBoot` toggle controls a setting that nothing ever reads.
- `logLevel` is saved but no logging code filters by log level -- `LogService.kt` collects all entries, `LogPage.kt` displays them all.

**Qt:**
- All Qt controls have fully functional save/load cycles. The implementation is complete and robust. The only potential gap (which is outside the scope of the settings page itself) is whether external consumers like the network module actually read the `isAutoReconnect()` and `isHideOnTray()` static methods at appropriate times.

---

### Summary

The **Qt Desktop implementation** is fully functional -- all 6 interactive controls (4 checkboxes + 2 buttons) have complete save/load/action cycles, including OS-level operations for auto-start and a full HTTP-based update checker.

The **Android implementation** is a mix of fully functional, partially functional, and entirely non-functional controls:
- **Fully working**: View Running Logs (navigates to LogPage), Clear All Data (dialog + wipe), version/platform/backend info (read-only display).
- **Saved but not applied**: Follow System Theme, Dark Mode -- persisted to disk but never consumed, so toggling them does nothing visible.
- **Saved but no consumer exists anywhere**: Start on Boot, Auto Reconnect, Connect Notification, Disconnect Notification, Log Level -- these are stored in SharedPreferences but no code in the app reads or acts upon them.

185	    ) {

188	            if (hint != null) Text(hint, fontSize = 12.sp, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
189	        }
190	        Switch(checked = value, onCheckedChange = onChanged)
191	    }
192	}

76	class SettingsRepository(context: Context) {
77	    private val prefs: SharedPreferences =
78	        context.getSharedPreferences("easytier_settings", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
79	
80	    // ── 通用设置 ──
81	
82	    var followSystemTheme: Boolean
83	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("follow_system", true)

85

94	    // ── 网络设置 ──
95	
96	    var autoReconnect: Boolean
97	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("auto_reconnect", false)
98	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("auto_reconnect", v).apply()
99	
100	    // ── 通知设置 ──
101	
102	    var notifyOnConnect: Boolean
103	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("notify_on_connect", true)
104	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("notify_on_connect", v).apply()
105	
106	    var notifyOnDisconnect: Boolean
107	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("notify_on_disconnect", true)
108	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("notify_on_disconnect", v).apply()
109	
110	    // ── 日志设置 ──
111	
112	    var logLevel: String
113	        get() = prefs.getString("log_level", "info") ?: "info"
114	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putString("log_level", v).apply()
115	
116	    var oneClickGuestCodeDraft: String
117	        get() = prefs.getString("one_click_guest_code_draft", "") ?: ""
118	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putString("one_click_guest_code_draft", v).apply()
119	
120	    // ── 网络配置持久化 ──
121	
122	    fun saveNetworkConfigs(jsonArray: JSONArray) {
123	        prefs.edit().putString("network_configs", jsonArray.toString()).apply()
124	    }
125	
126	    fun saveNetworkConfigs(configs: List<NetworkConfig>) {
127	        val jsonArray = JSONArray()
128	        configs.forEach { jsonArray.put(JSONObject(it.toJson())) }
129	        saveNetworkConfigs(jsonArray)
130	    }
131	
132	    fun loadNetworkConfigsJson(): JSONArray? {
133	        val json = prefs.getString("network_configs", null) ?: return null
134	        return try { JSONArray(json) } catch (_: Exception) { null }
135	    }
136	
137	    fun loadNetworkConfigs(): MutableList<NetworkConfig> {
138	        val jsonArray = loadNetworkConfigsJson() ?: return mutableListOf(NetworkConfig())
139	        val configs = mutableListOf<NetworkConfig>()
140	
141	        for (index in 0 until jsonArray.length()) {
142	            val obj = jsonArray.optJSONObject(index) ?: continue
143	            configs.add(NetworkConfig.fromJson(obj))
144	        }
145	
146	        return if (configs.isEmpty()) mutableListOf(NetworkConfig()) else configs
147	    }
148	
149	    fun addServerToFirstNetworkConfig(serverUrl: String): Boolean {
150	        val configs = loadNetworkConfigs()
151	        val firstConfig = configs.firstOrNull() ?: return false
152	
153	        if (firstConfig.servers.any { it == serverUrl }) {
154	            return false
155	        }
156	
157	        firstConfig.servers = (firstConfig.servers + serverUrl).toMutableList()
158	        saveNetworkConfigs(configs)
159	        return true
160	    }
161	
162	    // ── 服务器收藏 ──
163	
164	    fun saveFavoriteServers(jsonArray: JSONArray) {
165	        prefs.edit().putString("favorite_servers", jsonArray.toString()).apply()
166	    }
167	
168	    fun loadFavoriteServersJson(): JSONArray? {
169	        val json = prefs.getString("favorite_servers", null) ?: return null
170	        return try { JSONArray(json) } catch (_: Exception) { null }
171	    }
172	
173	    fun loadFavoriteServers(): MutableList<ServerEntry> {
174	        val json = loadFavoriteServersJson() ?: return defaultServerEntries()
175	        val servers = mutableListOf<ServerEntry>()
176	
177	        for (index in 0 until json.length()) {
178	            val obj = json.optJSONObject(index) ?: continue
179	            servers.add(ServerEntry.fromJson(obj))
180	        }
181	
182	        return if (servers.isEmpty() || isLegacyDefaultServerList(servers)) {
183	            defaultServerEntries()
184	        } else {
185	            servers
186	        }
187	    }
188	
189	    fun saveFavoriteServers(servers: List<ServerEntry>) {
190	        val jsonArray = JSONArray()
191	        servers.forEach { jsonArray.put(it.toJson()) }
192	        saveFavoriteServers(jsonArray)
193	    }
194	
195	    private fun defaultServerEntries(): MutableList<ServerEntry> {
196	        return NetworkConfig.defaultServers().map { url ->
197	            val name = when (url) {
198	                "tcp://225284.xyz:11010" -> "225284 公共服务器"
199	                "tcp://183.230.36.171:11010" -> "183.230 公共服务器"
200	                else -> url
201	            }
202	            ServerEntry(name = name, url = url, isDefault = true)
203	        }.toMutableList()
204	    }
205	
206	    private fun isLegacyDefaultServerList(servers: List<ServerEntry>): Boolean {
207	        return servers.size == 1 && servers.first().isDefault && servers.first().url == "wss://qtet-public.070219.xyz"
208	    }

226	    private fun saveOneClickSession(key: String, session: OneClickSessionSnapshot?) {
227	        val editor = prefs.edit()
228	        if (session == null) {
229	            editor.remove(key)
230	        } else {
231	            editor.putString(key, session.toJson().toString())
232	        }
233	        editor.apply()
234	    }
235	
236	    private fun loadOneClickSession(key: String): OneClickSessionSnapshot? {
237	        val raw = prefs.getString(key, null) ?: return null
238	        return try {

240	        } catch (_: Exception) {
241	            null
242	        }
243	    }
244

187	void QtETSettings::setupConnections()
188	{
189	    // 复选框状态变化
190	    connect(m_hideOnTrayCheckBox, &QCheckBox::checkStateChanged, this, &QtETSettings::onCheckBoxStateChanged);
191	    connect(m_autoReconnectCheckBox, &QCheckBox::checkStateChanged, this, &QtETSettings::onCheckBoxStateChanged);
192	    connect(m_autoCheckUpdateCheckBox, &QCheckBox::checkStateChanged, this, &QtETSettings::onCheckBoxStateChanged);
193	    connect(m_autoStartCheckBox, &QCheckBox::checkStateChanged, this, &QtETSettings::onCheckBoxStateChanged);
194	
195	    // 按钮点击
196	    connect(m_saveBtn, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &QtETSettings::onSaveButtonClicked);
197	    connect(m_discardBtn, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &QtETSettings::onDiscardButtonClicked);
198	    connect(m_checkUpdateBtn, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &QtETSettings::onCheckUpdateButtonClicked);
199	}
200	
201	// ==================== UI 事件处理 ====================
202	
203	void QtETSettings::onCheckBoxStateChanged()
204	{
205	    updateButtonState();
206	}
207	
208	void QtETSettings::onSaveButtonClicked()
209	{
210	    // 处理开机自启设置变更
211	    bool newAutoStart = m_autoStartCheckBox->isChecked();
212	    if (m_lastSavedAutoStart != newAutoStart) {
213	        if (!setAutoStart(newAutoStart)) {
214	            // 设置失败，恢复复选框状态
215	            m_autoStartCheckBox->setChecked(m_lastSavedAutoStart);
216	            return;
217	        }
218	    }
219	
220	    // 保存设置
221	    saveSettings();
222	
223	    // 更新上次保存的值
224	    m_lastSavedHideOnTray = m_hideOnTray;
225	    m_lastSavedAutoReconnect = m_autoReconnect;
226	    m_lastSavedAutoCheckUpdate = m_autoCheckUpdate;
227	    m_lastSavedAutoStart = m_autoStart;
228	
229	    // 更新按钮状态
230	    updateButtonState();
231	
232	    // 发送设置更改信号
233	    emit settingsChanged();
234	
235	    // 如果隐藏到托盘设置改变了，发送专门信号
236	    if (m_hideOnTray != m_lastSavedHideOnTray) {
237	        emit hideOnTrayChanged(m_hideOnTray);
238	    }
239	
240	    // 显示保存成功提示
241	    QMessageBox::information(this, tr("保存成功"), tr("设置已保存"));
242	}

244	void QtETSettings::onDiscardButtonClicked()
245	{
246	    // 恢复到上次保存的设置
247	    discardChanges();

255	void QtETSettings::updateButtonState()
256	{

259	    m_discardBtn->setEnabled(hasChanges);

262	// ==================== 设置读写 ====================
263	
264	QString QtETSettings::getConfigPath()
265	{
266	#if SAVE_CONF_IN_APP_DIR == true
267	    return QCoreApplication::applicationDirPath() + "/config";
268	#else
269	    return QStandardPaths::writableLocation(QStandardPaths::AppConfigLocation);
270	#endif
271	}
272	
273	QString QtETSettings::getPublicServersPath()
274	{
275	    return QCoreApplication::applicationDirPath() + "/publicservers.json";
276	}
277	
278	QJsonObject QtETSettings::loadSettingsFromFile()
279	{
280	    QString configPath = getConfigPath();
281	    QDir dir(configPath);
282	
283	    // 确保目录存在
284	    if (!dir.exists()) {
285	        dir.mkpath(".");
286	    }
287	
288	    QString settingsFile = configPath + "/settings2.json";
289	
290	    QFile file(settingsFile);
291	    if (!file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly)) {
292	        return QJsonObject();
293	    }
294	
295	    QByteArray data = file.readAll();
296	    file.close();
297	
298	    QJsonParseError error;
299	    QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(data, &error);
300	
301	    if (error.error != QJsonParseError::NoError || !doc.isObject()) {
302	        return QJsonObject();
303	    }
304	
305	    return doc.object();
306	}
307	
308	bool QtETSettings::saveSettingsToFile(const QJsonObject &settings)
309	{
310	    QString configPath = getConfigPath();
311	    QDir dir(configPath);
312	
313	    // 确保目录存在
314	    if (!dir.exists()) {
315	        if (!dir.mkpath(".")) {
316	            return false;
317	        }
318	    }
319	
320	    QString settingsFile = configPath + "/settings2.json";
321	    QJsonDocument doc(settings);
322	
323	    QFile file(settingsFile);
324	    if (!file.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
325	        return false;
326	    }
327	
328	    file.write(doc.toJson(QJsonDocument::Indented));
329	    file.close();
330	
331	    return true;
332	}
333	
334	void QtETSettings::loadSettings()
335	{
336	    QJsonObject settings = loadSettingsFromFile();
337	
338	    m_hideOnTray = settings.value("hide_on_tray").toBool(true);
339	    m_autoReconnect = settings.value("auto_reconnect").toBool(false);
340	    m_autoCheckUpdate = settings.value("auto_check_update").toBool(true);
341	    m_autoStart = settings.value("auto_start").toBool(false);
342	
343	    // 更新上次保存的值
344	    m_lastSavedHideOnTray = m_hideOnTray;
345	    m_lastSavedAutoReconnect = m_autoReconnect;
346	    m_lastSavedAutoCheckUpdate = m_autoCheckUpdate;
347	    m_lastSavedAutoStart = m_autoStart;
348	}
349	
350	void QtETSettings::saveSettings()
351	{
352	    // 从 UI 读取当前值
353	    m_hideOnTray = m_hideOnTrayCheckBox->isChecked();
354	    m_autoReconnect = m_autoReconnectCheckBox->isChecked();
355	    m_autoCheckUpdate = m_autoCheckUpdateCheckBox->isChecked();
356	    m_autoStart = m_autoStartCheckBox->isChecked();
357	
358	    // 保存到文件
359	    QJsonObject settings = loadSettingsFromFile();
360	    settings["hide_on_tray"] = m_hideOnTray;
361	    settings["auto_reconnect"] = m_autoReconnect;
362	    settings["auto_check_update"] = m_autoCheckUpdate;
363	    settings["auto_start"] = m_autoStart;
364	
365	    if (!saveSettingsToFile(settings)) {
366	        QMessageBox::warning(this, tr("错误"), tr("无法保存设置"));
367	    }
368	}
369	
370	void QtETSettings::discardChanges()
371	{
372	    // 恢复复选框状态
373	    m_hideOnTrayCheckBox->setChecked(m_lastSavedHideOnTray);
374	    m_autoReconnectCheckBox->setChecked(m_lastSavedAutoReconnect);
375	    m_autoCheckUpdateCheckBox->setChecked(m_lastSavedAutoCheckUpdate);
376	    m_autoStartCheckBox->setChecked(m_lastSavedAutoStart);
377	
378	    // 恢复内部值
379	    m_hideOnTray = m_lastSavedHideOnTray;
380	    m_autoReconnect = m_lastSavedAutoReconnect;
381	    m_autoCheckUpdate = m_lastSavedAutoCheckUpdate;
382	    m_autoStart = m_lastSavedAutoStart;
383	
384	    // 更新按钮状态
385	    updateButtonState();
386	}
387	
388	bool QtETSettings::hasUnsavedChanges() const
389	{
390	    return m_hideOnTrayCheckBox->isChecked() != m_lastSavedHideOnTray ||
391	           m_autoReconnectCheckBox->isChecked() != m_lastSavedAutoReconnect ||
392	           m_autoCheckUpdateCheckBox->isChecked() != m_lastSavedAutoCheckUpdate ||
393	           m_autoStartCheckBox->isChecked() != m_lastSavedAutoStart;
394	}

422	bool QtETSettings::setAutoStart(bool enable)
423	{
424	#ifdef Q_OS_WIN
425	    // Windows 平台：使用任务计划程序实现开机自启
426	    const QString appName = "QtEasyTier";
427	    const QString appPath = QCoreApplication::applicationFilePath().replace("/", "\\");
428	    QProcess process;
429	
430	    QStringList args;
431	    if (enable) {
432	        // 创建开机自启任务
433	        args << "/create"
434	             << "/tn" << appName
435	             << "/tr" << QString("\"%1\" --auto-start").arg(appPath)
436	             << "/sc" << "onlogon"
437	             << "/rl" << "highest"
438	             << "/f";
439	    } else {
440	        // 删除开机自启任务
441	        args << "/delete"
442	             << "/tn" << appName
443	             << "/f";
444	    }
445	
446	    process.start("schtasks.exe", args);
447	
448	    if (!process.waitForFinished(5000)) {
449	        std::clog << QString("开机自启任务失败：命令执行超时").toStdString() << std::endl;
450	        return false;
451	    }
452	
453	    if (process.exitCode() != 0) {
454	        QString error = QString::fromLocal8Bit(process.readAllStandardError());
455	        std::clog << QString("开机自启任务失败：%1").arg(error).toStdString() << std::endl;
456	        return false;
457	    }
458	
459	    std::clog << QString("%1自启任务成功").arg(enable ? "创建" : "删除").toStdString() << std::endl;
460	
461	#elif defined(Q_OS_LINUX)
462	    // Linux 平台：使用 freedesktop.org autostart 规范
463	    const QString appName = "QtEasyTier";
464	    const QString appPath = QCoreApplication::applicationFilePath();
465	
466	    // 获取 autostart 目录路径
467	    QString configHome = qEnvironmentVariable("XDG_CONFIG_HOME");
468	    if (configHome.isEmpty()) {
469	        configHome = QDir::homePath() + "/.config";
470	    }
471	    QString autostartDir = configHome + "/autostart";
472	    QString desktopFilePath = autostartDir + "/" + appName + ".desktop";
473	
474	    if (enable) {
475	        // 创建 autostart 目录（如果不存在）
476	        QDir().mkpath(autostartDir);
477	
478	        // 创建 .desktop 文件
479	        QString desktopContent = QString(
480	            "[Desktop Entry]\n"
481	            "Type=Application\n"
482	            "Name=%1\n"
483	            "Exec=%2 --auto-start\n"
484	            "Icon=%1\n"
485	            "Comment=QtEasyTier - EasyTier GUI Client\n"
486	            "Terminal=false\n"
487	            "Categories=Network;\n"
488	        ).arg(appName, appPath);
489	
490	        QFile desktopFile(desktopFilePath);
491	        if (!desktopFile.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
492	            return false;
493	        }
494	        desktopFile.write(desktopContent.toUtf8());
495	        desktopFile.close();
496	        std::clog << "[AutoStart] Created autostart entry: " << desktopFilePath.toStdString() << std::endl;
497	    } else {
498	        // 删除 .desktop 文件
499	        if (QFile::exists(desktopFilePath)) {
500	            if (!QFile::remove(desktopFilePath)) {
501	                return false;
502	            }
503	        }
504	        std::clog << "[AutoStart] Removed autostart entry: " << desktopFilePath.toStdString() << std::endl;
505	    }
506	
507	#else
508	    // 其他平台：暂不支持
509	    Q_UNUSED(enable)
510	    return false;
511	#endif
512	
513	    return true;
514	}
515

528	
529	void QtETSettings::checkForUpdate(QWidget *parent, bool silent)
530	{
531	    const QUrl url("https://gitee.com/api/v5/repos/myqfeng/qt-easy-tier/releases/latest");
532	
533	    // 创建网络管理器
534	    auto *networkManager = new QNetworkAccessManager(parent);
535	    QNetworkReply *reply = networkManager->get(QNetworkRequest(url));
536	    reply->setParent(networkManager);
537	
538	    // 设置超时定时器（10 秒）
539	    auto *timeoutTimer = new QTimer(networkManager);
540	    timeoutTimer->setSingleShot(true);
541	    timeoutTimer->start(10000);
542	
543	    // 超时处理：中止请求
544	    QObject::connect(timeoutTimer, &QTimer::timeout, reply, &QNetworkReply::abort);
545	
546	    // 请求完成处理
547	    QObject::connect(reply, &QNetworkReply::finished, parent, [=]() {
548	        // 停止并删除超时定时器
549	        if (timeoutTimer) {
550	            timeoutTimer->stop();
551	            timeoutTimer->deleteLater();
552	        }
553	
554	        // 检查请求结果
555	        if (reply->error() == QNetworkReply::NoError) {
556	            // 解析 JSON 响应
557	            QByteArray response = reply->readAll();
558	            QJsonDocument jsonDoc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(response);
559	            QJsonObject jsonObj = jsonDoc.object();
560	
561	            QString latestVersion = jsonObj["tag_name"].toString();
562	
563	            // 对比版本号
564	            if (!latestVersion.isEmpty() && latestVersion > QString::fromUtf8(PROJECT_VERSION)) {
565	                QString msg = QString(tr("发现新版本：%1\n当前版本：%2\n是否前往下载？"))
566	                              .arg(latestVersion).arg(QString::fromUtf8(PROJECT_VERSION));
567	
568	                QMessageBox::StandardButton ret = QMessageBox::question(
569	                    parent, tr("检查更新"), msg, QMessageBox::Yes | QMessageBox::No);
570	
571	                if (ret == QMessageBox::Yes) {
572	                    QDesktopServices::openUrl(QUrl("https://gitee.com/myqfeng/qt-easy-tier/releases"));
573	                }
574	            } else if (!silent) {
575	                QMessageBox::information(parent, tr("检查更新"), tr("当前已是最新版本！"));
576	            }
577	        } else if (reply->error() != QNetworkReply::OperationCanceledError) {
578	            // 非超时错误才显示提示
579	            QMessageBox::warning(parent, tr("检查更新"),
580	                QString(tr("网络请求失败：%1")).arg(reply->errorString()));
581	        } else {
582	            // 超时提示
583	            QMessageBox::warning(parent, tr("检查更新"), tr("网络请求超时，请稍后重试！"));
584	        }
585	
586	        // 删除网络管理器
587	        networkManager->deleteLater();
588	    });
589	}
590	
591

1	package com.easytier

3	import android.os.Bundle

5	import androidx.activity.compose.setContent
6	import androidx.activity.enableEdgeToEdge
7	import androidx.compose.runtime.CompositionLocalProvider

9	import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalDensity

16	class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
17	    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
18	        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
19	        enableEdgeToEdge()
20	
21	        val settingsRepo = SettingsRepository(this)
22	
23	        setContent {
24	            val baseDensity = LocalDensity.current
25	            val scaledDensity = remember(baseDensity) {
26	                Density(
27	                    density = baseDensity.density * 0.95f,
28	                    fontScale = baseDensity.fontScale * 0.95f,
29	                )
30	            }
31	
32	            CompositionLocalProvider(
33	                LocalDensity provides scaledDensity,
34	                LocalSettingsRepository provides settingsRepo,
35	            ) {
36	                EasyTierTheme {
37	                    HomePage()
38	                }
39	            }
40	        }
41	    }
42	}

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now let me check the log page and also look at the Qt project for more settings-related files. Let me also look for any "check update" functionality in the Android app.

Let me also see if there are any references to the theme settings being passed from the SettingsPage to the HomePage or any other mechanism for applying the dark mode / follow system setting.

Looking at what I've gathered so far:
- The MainActivity creates a `SettingsRepository` and provides it via `LocalSettingsRepository`
- HomePage doesn't pass any settings to `EasyTierTheme` - it just uses `EasyTierTheme()` with default `darkTheme` parameter
- The SettingsPage saves settings to the repository but the theme changes are only updated when the composable recomposes - they're not actually passed to EasyTierTheme

This is a significant finding - the dark mode / follow system theme settings are saved to SharedPreferences but are NOT actually applied to the UI. The `EasyTierTheme` in HomePage uses the default `isSystemInDarkTheme()` rather than reading from the settings repository.

Let me also check the Qt implementation for any other settings-related files and check for the "check update" feature more thoroughly.
</details></think>

26	fun LogPage(onBack: (() -> Unit)? = null) {
27	    val context = LocalContext.current
28	    var logs by remember { mutableStateOf(LogService.logs) }
29	    var autoScroll by remember { mutableStateOf(true) }

33	    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
34	        while (true) {
35	            logs = LogService.logs
36	            if (autoScroll && logs.isNotEmpty()) {

38	            }
39	            delay(1000)
40	        }
41	    }
42	
43	    Scaffold(
44	        topBar = {
45	            CompactTopBar(

50	                            AppIcon(AppIcons.ArrowBack, contentDescription = "返回")
51	                        }
52	                    }
53	                }
54	            ) {
55	                    IconButton(onClick = {
56	                        val text = LogService.logs.joinToString("\n") { it.toFormattedString() }
57	                        val clipboard = context.getSystemService(Context.CLIPBOARD_SERVICE) as ClipboardManager
58	                        clipboard.setPrimaryClip(ClipData.newPlainText("easytier_logs", text))
59	                    }) {
60	                        AppIcon(AppIcons.Copy, contentDescription = "复制日志")
61	                    }

64	                    }

66	                        AppIcon(AppIcons.DeleteSweep, contentDescription = "清除")
67	                    }
68	            }
69	        }
70	    ) {
71	        if (logs.isEmpty()) {
72	            Box(

75	            ) {
76	                Text("暂无日志", color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
77	            }
78	        } else {
79	            LazyColumn(
80	                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize().padding(it),
81	                state = listState,
82	                contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 10.dp, vertical = 8.dp)
83	            ) {

87	                        LogLevel.INFO -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a comprehensive picture of both the Android and Qt settings page implementations. Let me compile my findings.

## Summary of Android Settings Page

**File:** `android/app/src/main/java/com/easytier/ui/pages/SettingsPage.kt`

### Controls/Buttons:

1. **"跟随系统" (Follow System Theme) - Switch**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Writes `repo.followSystemTheme` and when enabled, disables darkMode
   - However, the dark mode setting is NOT actually consumed by `EasyTierTheme` - it only uses `isSystemInDarkTheme()` default. So the setting IS saved but NOT applied.

2. **"深色模式" (Dark Mode) - Switch** (only visible when followSystem is off)
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED (saves to SharedPreferences)
   - Same issue as above - saved but NOT actually applied to the theme

3. **"开机自启" (Start on Boot) - Switch**
   - Status: PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Writes to SharedPreferences, BUT there is NO `BootReceiver` in the Android app
   - No `BOOT_COMPLETED` permission or receiver in AndroidManifest.xml
   - The setting is persisted but has no actual effect

4. **"自动回连" (Auto Reconnect) - Switch**
   - Status: BROKEN / UNIMPLEMENTED
   - Writes to SharedPreferences, but no code in EasyTierService or EasyTierVpnService reads this value or implements auto-reconnect logic

5. **"连接成功通知" (Connect Success Notification) - Switch**
   - Status: BROKEN / UNIMPLEMENTED
   - Writes to SharedPreferences, but no notification code reads this setting. The notification services (EasyTierService, EasyTierVpnService) don't reference SettingsRepository at all.

6. **"断开连接通知" (Disconnect Notification) - Switch**
   - Status: BROKEN / UNIMPLEMENTED
   - Same as above

7. **"日志级别" (Log Level) - Dropdown**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED (saves to SharedPreferences)
   - However, no known consumer checks this log level value

8. **"查看运行日志" (View Running Logs) - Clickable Item**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Calls `onNavigateToLog?.invoke()` which navigates to LogPage

9. **"清除所有数据" (Clear All Data) - Button**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Shows confirmation dialog, then calls `repo.clearAll()` which wipes all SharedPreferences

10. **Version Info (Info-only)**
    - Status: READ-ONLY, implemented as `InfoRow("版本", "${BuildConfig.VERSION_NAME} (${BuildConfig.VERSION_CODE})")`

## Summary of Qt Settings Page

**File:** `qt-easy-tier-master/Qt_Gui/qtetsettings.cpp` and `qtetsettings.h`

### Controls/Buttons:

1. **"关闭时隐藏到托盘" (Hide to Tray on Close) - CheckBox**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Saved to JSON file `settings2.json`, has signal `hideOnTrayChanged` emitted
   - Has static method `isHideOnTray()` for external access

2. **"自动回连" (Auto Reconnect) - CheckBox**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED (save/load cycle complete)
   - Has static method `isAutoReconnect()` for external access, but there may or may not be a consumer

3. **"自动检查更新" (Auto Check Updates) - CheckBox**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED (save/load cycle complete)
   - Has static method `isAutoCheckUpdate()` for external access

4. **"开机自启" (Start on Boot) - CheckBox**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Has actual OS-level implementation with `setAutoStart()`:
     - Windows: Uses `schtasks.exe` to create/delete scheduled tasks
     - Linux: Creates/deletes `.desktop` file in `~/.config/autostart/`
   - Error handling with rollback on failure

5. **Version Label** (Info-only)
   - Status: READ-ONLY
   - Shows `PROJECT_VERSION` with beta flag and `ET_VERSION`

6. **"检查更新" (Check Update) - Button**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Makes HTTP request to Gitee API to check latest release version
   - 10-second timeout
   - Compares versions and opens browser if newer version exists
   - Silent mode support (no "already latest" message)

7. **"保存" (Save) - Button**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Saves all settings to JSON file
   - Emits `settingsChanged` and `hideOnTrayChanged` signals
   - Shows success message
   - Enabled only when unsaved changes exist

8. **"丢弃" (Discard) - Button**
   - Status: FULLY IMPLEMENTED
   - Reverts all checkboxes to last saved values
   - Enabled only when unsaved changes exist

### Key Observations:
- The Qt implementation is significantly more complete than the Android implementation
- No TODO/FIXME comments exist in either the Android kotlin files or the Qt C++ files
- The Android implementation has settings that save to SharedPreferences but have NO consumers - they could work, they just don't affect anything outside the settings page itself
</details></think>

|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 1 | **"跟随系统" (Follow System)** | Toggle Switch | PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saves to SharedPreferences (`follow_system` key). When enabled, it also clears `darkMode`. However, the setting is NEVER consumed: `EasyTierTheme()` in HomePage.kt always uses the default `isSystemInDarkTheme()` parameter. The user's preference is stored but has zero visible effect on the app. |
| 2 | **"深色模式" (Dark Mode)** | Toggle Switch (conditional, shown only when "跟随系统" is off) | PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saves to SharedPreferences (`dark_mode` key). Same critical gap: it is never passed to `EasyTierTheme()`. The theme composable in `Theme.kt` accepts a `darkTheme: Boolean` parameter, but `HomePage.kt` calls it as `EasyTierTheme()` with no arguments, so it always uses the system default. The toggle saves the value but it does nothing. |
| 3 | **"开机自启" (Start on Boot)** | Toggle Switch | NOT FUNCTIONAL -- Saves to SharedPreferences, but there is **no `BroadcastReceiver` for `BOOT_COMPLETED`** anywhere in the Android app. The `AndroidManifest.xml` does not declare the `RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED` permission, nor does it register any boot receiver. The setting is purely decorative. |

#### Section: "网络" (Network)

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 4 | **"自动回连" (Auto Reconnect)** | Toggle Switch | NOT FUNCTIONAL -- Saves to SharedPreferences (`auto_reconnect` key). Neither `EasyTierService.kt` nor `EasyTierVpnService.kt` reference `SettingsRepository` or this setting at all. No reconnect logic reads this value. |

#### Section: "通知" (Notifications)

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 5 | **"连接成功通知" (Connect Success Notification)** | Toggle Switch | NOT FUNCTIONAL -- Saves to SharedPreferences. Neither `EasyTierService.kt` nor `EasyTierVpnService.kt` reference `SettingsRepository` or show any notifications. The app has no consumer of this setting anywhere. |
| 6 | **"断开连接通知" (Disconnect Notification)** | Toggle Switch | NOT FUNCTIONAL -- Identical situation to #5. |

#### Section: "日志" (Logs)

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 7 | **"日志级别" (Log Level)** | Dropdown (debug/info/warn/error) | PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saves to SharedPreferences. However, no log filtering code reads this value. The `LogService.kt` collects all log entries; the `LogPage.kt` displays all of them with no level-based filtering. |
| 8 | **"查看运行日志" (View Running Logs)** | Clickable List Item with chevron | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Calls `onNavigateToLog?.invoke()`, which is wired in `HomePage.kt` (line 138: `onNavigateToLog = { showLogPage = true }`) to show the `LogPage` composable. The log page itself has working features: copy-to-clipboard, auto-scroll toggle, and clear. |

#### Section: "关于" (About)

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 9 | **"版本" (Version)** | Info Row (read-only) | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Displays `BuildConfig.VERSION_NAME` and `VERSION_CODE`. |
| 10 | **"运行平台" (Platform)** | Info Row (read-only) | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Displays hardcoded "Android". |
| 11 | **"后端" (Backend)** | Info Row (read-only) | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Displays hardcoded "EasyTier JNI". |

#### Bottom Action

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 12 | **"清除所有数据" (Clear All Data)** | Destructive Text Button | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Shows an `AppDialog` confirmation dialog. On confirm, calls `repo.clearAll()` which wipes all SharedPreferences, then resets all local state variables to defaults. |

---

### 3. Qt Settings Page -- Buttons/Controls and Their Implementation Status

| Control | Label | Type | Implementation Status |
|---------|-------|------|----------------------|
| 1 | **"关闭时隐藏到托盘" (Hide to Tray on Close)** | CheckBox | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saved to/loaded from JSON file (`settings2.json`). Has dedicated signal `hideOnTrayChanged(bool)`. Static accessor `isHideOnTray()` for external consumers. |
| 2 | **"自动回连" (Auto Reconnect)** | CheckBox | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Save/load cycle complete. Static accessor `isAutoReconnect()` available. |
| 3 | **"自动检查更新" (Auto Check Updates)** | CheckBox | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Save/load cycle complete. Static accessor `isAutoCheckUpdate()` available. |
| 4 | **"开机自启" (Start on Boot)** | CheckBox | FULLY IMPLEMENTED with actual OS-level code. On **Windows**: uses `schtasks.exe` to create/delete a scheduled task that runs on login with highest privileges. On **Linux**: creates/deletes a `.desktop` file in `~/.config/autostart/` following the freedesktop.org spec. On other platforms: returns false (not supported). Has error handling: if `setAutoStart()` fails, the checkbox reverts to its previous state and the save is aborted. |
| 5 | **Version Label** | Read-only Label | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Shows `PROJECT_VERSION`, `IS_BETA_VERSION` flag, and `ET_VERSION` (EasyTier FFI version). |
| 6 | **"检查更新" (Check Update)** | Push Button | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Makes an HTTP GET request to the Gitee API (`https://gitee.com/api/v5/repos/myqfeng/qt-easy-tier/releases/latest`). 10-second timeout. Compares `tag_name` against `PROJECT_VERSION`. If newer version found, shows "Yes/No" dialog that opens browser to the releases page. Error handling for network failures, timeouts, and cancelled operations. |
| 7 | **"保存" (Save)** | Push Button | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Saves all four checkbox states to JSON file, emits `settingsChanged()` and `hideOnTrayChanged()` signals. Shows success `QMessageBox`. Only enabled when `hasUnsavedChanges()` is true. |
| 8 | **"丢弃" (Discard)** | Push Button | FULLY IMPLEMENTED -- Reverts all checkboxes to `m_lastSaved*` values. Only enabled when `hasUnsavedChanges()` is true. |

---

### 4. TODO/FIXME Comments and Incomplete Implementations

**No TODO, FIXME, HACK, or XXX comments were found** in any of the settings-related files (both Android Kotlin and Qt C++). There are no explicit markers of known incomplete work.

However, there are significant **silent gaps** (unmarked incomplete/broken features):

**Android:**
- The entire dark mode / theme system is wired for save but not for application -- `EasyTierTheme()` in `HomePage.kt` never reads the settings. This is essentially a dead code path.
- `startOnBoot`, `autoReconnect`, `notifyOnConnect`, and `notifyOnDisconnect` all save to SharedPreferences but have zero consumers anywhere in the app. Neither the foreground service (`EasyTierService.kt`) nor the VPN service (`EasyTierVpnService.kt`) references `SettingsRepository` at all.
- No `BOOT_COMPLETED` broadcast receiver exists. The `startOnBoot` toggle controls a setting that nothing ever reads.
- `logLevel` is saved but no logging code filters by log level -- `LogService.kt` collects all entries, `LogPage.kt` displays them all.

**Qt:**
- All Qt controls have fully functional save/load cycles. The implementation is complete and robust. The only potential gap (which is outside the scope of the settings page itself) is whether external consumers like the network module actually read the `isAutoReconnect()` and `isHideOnTray()` static methods at appropriate times.

---

### Summary

The **Qt Desktop implementation** is fully functional -- all 6 interactive controls (4 checkboxes + 2 buttons) have complete save/load/action cycles, including OS-level operations for auto-start and a full HTTP-based update checker.

The **Android implementation** is a mix of fully functional, partially functional, and entirely non-functional controls:
- **Fully working**: View Running Logs (navigates to LogPage), Clear All Data (dialog + wipe), version/platform/backend info (read-only display).
- **Saved but not applied**: Follow System Theme, Dark Mode -- persisted to disk but never consumed, so toggling them does nothing visible.
- **Saved but no consumer exists anywhere**: Start on Boot, Auto Reconnect, Connect Notification, Disconnect Notification, Log Level -- these are stored in SharedPreferences but no code in the app reads or acts upon them.

75	/** 应用设置持久化 —— 封装 SharedPreferences */
76	class SettingsRepository(context: Context) {
77	    private val prefs: SharedPreferences =
78	        context.getSharedPreferences("easytier_settings", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
79	
80	    // ── 通用设置 ──
81	
82	    var followSystemTheme: Boolean
83	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("follow_system", true)
84	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("follow_system", v).apply()
85	
86	    var darkMode: Boolean
87	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("dark_mode", false)
88	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("dark_mode", v).apply()
89	
90	    var startOnBoot: Boolean
91	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("start_on_boot", false)
92	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("start_on_boot", v).apply()
93	
94	    // ── 网络设置 ──
95	
96	    var autoReconnect: Boolean
97	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("auto_reconnect", false)
98	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("auto_reconnect", v).apply()
99	
100	    // ── 通知设置 ──
101	
102	    var notifyOnConnect: Boolean
103	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("notify_on_connect", true)
104	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("notify_on_connect", v).apply()
105	
106	    var notifyOnDisconnect: Boolean
107	        get() = prefs.getBoolean("notify_on_disconnect", true)
108	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putBoolean("notify_on_disconnect", v).apply()
109	
110	    // ── 日志设置 ──
111	
112	    var logLevel: String
113	        get() = prefs.getString("log_level", "info") ?: "info"
114	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putString("log_level", v).apply()
115	
116	    var oneClickGuestCodeDraft: String
117	        get() = prefs.getString("one_click_guest_code_draft", "") ?: ""
118	        set(v) = prefs.edit().putString("one_click_guest_code_draft", v).apply()
119	
120	    // ── 网络配置持久化 ──
121	
122	    fun saveNetworkConfigs(jsonArray: JSONArray) {
123	        prefs.edit().putString("network_configs", jsonArray.toString()).apply()
124	    }
125	
126	    fun saveNetworkConfigs(configs: List<NetworkConfig>) {
127	        val jsonArray = JSONArray()
128	        configs.forEach { jsonArray.put(JSONObject(it.toJson())) }
129	        saveNetworkConfigs(jsonArray)
130	    }
131	
132	    fun loadNetworkConfigsJson(): JSONArray? {
133	        val json = prefs.getString("network_configs", null) ?: return null
134	        return try { JSONArray(json) } catch (_: Exception) { null }
135	    }
136	
137	    fun loadNetworkConfigs(): MutableList<NetworkConfig> {
138	        val jsonArray = loadNetworkConfigsJson() ?: return mutableListOf(NetworkConfig())
139	        val configs = mutableListOf<NetworkConfig>()
140	
141	        for (index in 0 until jsonArray.length()) {
142	            val obj = jsonArray.optJSONObject(index) ?: continue
143	            configs.add(NetworkConfig.fromJson(obj))
144	        }
145	
146	        return if (configs.isEmpty()) mutableListOf(NetworkConfig()) else configs
147	    }
148	
149	    fun addServerToFirstNetworkConfig(serverUrl: String): Boolean {
150	        val configs = loadNetworkConfigs()
151	        val firstConfig = configs.firstOrNull() ?: return false
152	
153	        if (firstConfig.servers.any { it == serverUrl }) {
154	            return false
155	        }
156	
157	        firstConfig.servers = (firstConfig.servers + serverUrl).toMutableList()
158	        saveNetworkConfigs(configs)
159	        return true
160	    }
161	
162	    // ── 服务器收藏 ──
163	
164	    fun saveFavoriteServers(jsonArray: JSONArray) {
165	        prefs.edit().putString("favorite_servers", jsonArray.toString()).apply()
166	    }
167	
168	    fun loadFavoriteServersJson(): JSONArray? {
169	        val json = prefs.getString("favorite_servers", null) ?: return null
170	        return try { JSONArray(json) } catch (_: Exception) { null }
171	    }
172	
173	    fun loadFavoriteServers(): MutableList<ServerEntry> {
174	        val json = loadFavoriteServersJson() ?: return defaultServerEntries()
175	        val servers = mutableListOf<ServerEntry>()
176	
177	        for (index in 0 until json.length()) {
178	            val obj = json.optJSONObject(index) ?: continue
179	            servers.add(ServerEntry.fromJson(obj))
180	        }
181	
182	        return if (servers.isEmpty() || isLegacyDefaultServerList(servers)) {
183	            defaultServerEntries()
184	        } else {
185	            servers
186	        }
187	    }
188	
189	    fun saveFavoriteServers(servers: List<ServerEntry>) {
190	        val jsonArray = JSONArray()
191	        servers.forEach { jsonArray.put(it.toJson()) }
192	        saveFavoriteServers(jsonArray)
193	    }
194	
195	    private fun defaultServerEntries(): MutableList<ServerEntry> {
196	        return NetworkConfig.defaultServers().map { url ->
197	            val name = when (url) {
198	                "tcp://225284.xyz:11010" -> "225284 公共服务器"
199	                "tcp://183.230.36.171:11010" -> "183.230 公共服务器"
200	                else -> url
201	            }
202	            ServerEntry(name = name, url = url, isDefault = true)
203	        }.toMutableList()
204	    }
205	
206	    private fun isLegacyDefaultServerList(servers: List<ServerEntry>): Boolean {
207	        return servers.size == 1 && servers.first().isDefault && servers.first().url == "wss://qtet-public.070219.xyz"
208	    }
209	
210	    fun saveOneClickHostSession(session: OneClickSessionSnapshot?) {
211	        saveOneClickSession("one_click_host_session", session)
212	    }
213	
214	    fun loadOneClickHostSession(): OneClickSessionSnapshot? {
215	        return loadOneClickSession("one_click_host_session")
216	    }
217	
218	    fun saveOneClickGuestSession(session: OneClickSessionSnapshot?) {
219	        saveOneClickSession("one_click_guest_session", session)
220	    }
221	
222	    fun loadOneClickGuestSession(): OneClickSessionSnapshot? {
223	        return loadOneClickSession("one_click_guest_session")
224	    }
225	
226	    private fun saveOneClickSession(key: String, session: OneClickSessionSnapshot?) {
227	        val editor = prefs.edit()
228	        if (session == null) {
229	            editor.remove(key)
230	        } else {
231	            editor.putString(key, session.toJson().toString())
232	        }
233	        editor.apply()
234	    }
235	
236	    private fun loadOneClickSession(key: String): OneClickSessionSnapshot? {
237	        val raw = prefs.getString(key, null) ?: return null
238	        return try {
239	            OneClickSessionSnapshot.fromJson(JSONObject(raw))
240	        } catch (_: Exception) {
241	            null
242	        }
243	    }
244	
245	    // ── 清除 ──
246	
247	    fun clearAll() {
248	        prefs.edit().clear().apply()
249	    }
250	}
251

277	@Composable
278	private fun PublicNodeCard(node: PublicNode, onUse: () -> Unit) {
279	    Card(
280	        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
281	        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface)
282	    ) {
283	        Row(
284	            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(start = 12.dp, end = 8.dp, top = 10.dp, bottom = 10.dp),
285	            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
286	        ) {
287	            // 状态灯
288	            Box(
289	                modifier = Modifier
290	                    .size(10.dp)
291	                    .clip(CircleShape)
292	                    .then(
293	                        if (node.isOnline) Modifier
294	                        else Modifier
295	                    )
296	                    .let { mod ->
297	                        mod.then(
298	                            if (node.isOnline) Modifier
299	                            else Modifier
300	                        )
301	                    }
302	            )
303	            // I'm doing the above nonsense because Kotlin's conditional chaining requires it.
304	            // Let me simplify:
305	            Spacer(Modifier.width(10.dp))
306	
307	            // Actually, let me just do inline:
308	            Surface(
309	                modifier = Modifier.size(10.dp),
310	                shape = CircleShape,
311	                color = if (node.isOnline) Color(0xFF4CAF50) else Color.Gray,
312	            ) {}
313	
314	            Spacer(Modifier.width(10.dp))
315	
316	            // 延迟
317	            if (node.ping != null) {
318	                val pingColor = when {
319	                    node.ping!! < 300 -> Color(0xFF4CAF50)
320	                    node.ping!! < 800 -> Color(0xFFFFA726)
321	                    else -> Color(0xFFEF5350)
322	                }
323	                Text(
324	                    text = "${node.ping}ms",
325	                    fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace,
326	                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
327	                    fontSize = 11.sp,
328	                    color = pingColor,

202	        cfg.listenAddresses = csvToMutableStringList(listenAddressesText)
203	        cfg.devName = devNameText.trim()
204	        cfg.mtu = mtuText.toIntOrNull()?.takeIf { it in 1..1380 } ?: 0
205	        cfg.defaultProtocol = defaultProtocolText.trim().lowercase()
206	        cfg.encryptionAlgorithm = encryptionAlgorithmText.trim().ifEmpty { "aes-gcm" }.lowercase()
207	        saveConfigs()
208	    }
209	
210	    fun copyVirtualIp(ip: String) {
211	        if (ip.isBlank()) return
212	        clipboard.setPrimaryClip(ClipData.newPlainText("easytier_virtual_ip", ip))
213	        Toast.makeText(context, "虚拟 IP 已复制到剪贴板", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
214	    }
215	
216	    fun shareVirtualIp(node: NodeInfo) {
217	        if (node.virtualIp.isBlank()) return
218	        val shareText = buildString {
219	            appendLine("EasyTier 直连地址")
220	            appendLine("设备: ${node.hostname.ifEmpty { "本机" }}")
221	            appendLine("虚拟 IP: ${node.virtualIp}")
222	            append("说明: 可在需要手动直连的场景中使用该地址。")
223	        }
224	        val shareIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND).apply {
225	            type = "text/plain"
226	            putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareText)
227	        }
228	        context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(shareIntent, "分享直连地址"))
229	    }
230	
231	    // 初始化绑定
232	    LaunchedEffect(selectedIndex) {
233	        if (configs.isNotEmpty()) bindConfig(selectedIndex)
234	    }
235	
236	    // 页面重建时同步 backend / VPN 实际运行态
237	    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
238	        EasyTierService.refreshRuntimeState()
239	    }
240	
241	    LaunchedEffect(runtimeState, selectedIndex, configs.size) {
242	        var changed = false
243	        configs.forEach { cfg ->
244	            val daemonRunning = runtimeState.runningInstances.contains(cfg.instanceName)
245	            if (cfg.isRunning != daemonRunning) {
246	                cfg.isRunning = daemonRunning
247	                changed = true
248	            }
249	        }
250	        if (changed) {
251	            forceRecompose()
252	        }
253	        isRunning = if (selectedIndex in configs.indices) {
254	            configs[selectedIndex].isRunning
255	        } else {
256	            false
257	        }
258	    }
259	
260	    // 节点定时监控
261	    LaunchedEffect(isRunning, selectedIndex) {
262	        if (isRunning && selectedIndex >= 0 && selectedIndex < configs.size) {
263	            while (true) {
264	                val instanceName = configs[selectedIndex].instanceName
265	                nodes = EasyTierService.collectNodeInfos(instanceName)
266	                delay(3000)
267	            }
268	        }
269	    }
270	
271	    // 添加配置
272	    fun addConfig() {
273	        saveCurrentConfig()
274	        val newCfg = NetworkConfig()
275	        configs = (configs + newCfg).toMutableList()
276	        selectedIndex = configs.size - 1
277	        saveConfigs()
278	    }
279	
280	    fun deleteConfig() {
281	        if (selectedIndex < 0 || selectedIndex >= configs.size) return
282	        LogService.info("删除网络配置: ${configs[selectedIndex].instanceName}", source = "NetworkConfig")
283	        configs = configs.toMutableList().also { it.removeAt(selectedIndex) }
284	        if (configs.isEmpty()) {
285	            val newCfg = NetworkConfig()
286	            configs = mutableListOf(newCfg)
287	        }
288	        selectedIndex = 0.coerceAtMost(configs.size - 1)
289	        saveConfigs()
290	    }
291	
292	    Scaffold(

294	        topBar = {
295	            CompactTopBar(title = "网络配置") {

297	                    IconButton(onClick = { deleteConfig() }) { AppIcon(AppIcons.Delete, contentDescription = "删除配置") }
298	                    IconButton(onClick = {

306	            // 配置标签页

341

344	                verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(5.dp)
345	            ) {
346	                // 基本设置
347	                Card(colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface)) {
348	                    Column(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(10.dp)) {
349	                        Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
350	                            AppIcon(AppIcons.Settings, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp))
351	                            Spacer(Modifier.width(6.dp))
352	                            Text("基本设置", fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold)
353	                        }
354	                        Spacer(Modifier.height(6.dp))
355	                        OutlinedTextField(value = labelText, onValueChange = { labelText = it; saveCurrentConfig() }, label = { Text("配置标签") }, placeholder = { Text("例如: 家庭网络") }, singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
356	                        Spacer(Modifier.height(5.dp))
357	                        OutlinedTextField(value = hostnameText, onValueChange = { hostnameText = it; saveCurrentConfig() }, label = { Text("本机主机名") }, placeholder = { Text("例如: my-phone") }, singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
358	                        Spacer(Modifier.height(5.dp))
359	                        OutlinedTextField(value = networkNameText, onValueChange = { networkNameText = it; saveCurrentConfig() }, label = { Text("网络名称") }, placeholder = { Text("例如: my-net") }, singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
360	                        Spacer(Modifier.height(5.dp))
361	                        OutlinedTextField(value = networkSecretText, onValueChange = { networkSecretText = it; saveCurrentConfig() }, label = { Text("网络密钥") }, placeholder = { Text("留空自动生成") }, singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
362	                        Spacer(Modifier.height(5.dp))
363	
364	                        if (configs.getOrNull(selectedIndex)?.dhcp != true) {
365	                            Spacer(Modifier.height(5.dp))
366	                            OutlinedTextField(value = ipv4Text, onValueChange = { ipv4Text = it }, label = { Text("静态 IPv4") }, placeholder = { Text("例如: 10.144.144.10") }, singleLine = true, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth())
367	                        }
368	                    }

371	                // 入口服务器
372	                Card(colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface)) {
373	                    Column(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(10.dp)) {
374	                        Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
375	                            AppIcon(AppIcons.Dns, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp))
376	                            Spacer(Modifier.width(6.dp))
377	                            Text("入口服务器", fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
378	                            TextButton(onClick = {

380	                            }) { Text("管理") }
381	                        }
382	                        if (selectedIndex in configs.indices) {
383	                            configs[selectedIndex].servers.forEach { server ->
384	                                Row(modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 2.dp)) {
385	                                    Text("•", fontSize = 12.sp, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
386	                                    Spacer(Modifier.width(6.dp))

388	                                }
389	                            }
390	                        }
391	                    }
392	                }

394	                // 服务器管理对话框
395	                if (showServerDialog && selectedIndex in configs.indices) {
396	                    val cfg = configs[selectedIndex]
397	                    var servers by remember { mutableStateOf(cfg.servers.toMutableList()) }
398	                    var newUrl by remember { mutableStateOf("") }
399	
400	                    AppDialog(
401	                        title = "管理入口服务器",
402	                        onDismissRequest = { showServerDialog = false },
403	                        confirmText = "确定",
404	                        icon = AppIcons.Dns,
405	                        onConfirm = {

407	                        }

427	                        }
428	                        if (servers.isEmpty()) {
429	                            Text("暂无服务器", color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
430	                        } else {

432	                            curServers.forEachIndexed { idx, server ->
433	                                Surface(
434	                                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
435	                                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
436	                                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background
437	                                ) {

441	                                    ) {

445	                                            fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace,
446	                                            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
447	                                            maxLines = 1
448	                                        )

451	                                        }) {

453	                                        }

458	                    }
459	                }
460	
461	                // VPN 占用冲突对话框
462	                if (showVpnConflictDialog && selectedIndex in configs.indices) {
463	                    val otherInstance = EasyTierService.getActiveVpnInstanceName()
464	                    AlertDialog(
465	                        onDismissRequest = { showVpnConflictDialog = false },
466	                        title = { Text("VPN 已被占用") },
467	                        text = {
468	                            Text("实例「${otherInstance ?: "未知"}」正在使用 VPN。\n\n是否释放该 VPN，让当前实例使用？\n释放后原实例将以无 TUN 模式继续运行。\n\n点击「释放 VPN」后请再次点击「启动网络」。")
469	                        },
470	                        confirmButton = {
471	                            TextButton(onClick = {
472	                                showVpnConflictDialog = false
473	                                scope.launch {
474	                                    EasyTierService.stopVpnService(context, otherInstance)
475	                                    showToast("VPN 已释放，请再次点击启动")
476	                                }
477	                            }) { Text("释放 VPN") }
478	                        },
479	                        dismissButton = {
480	                            TextButton(onClick = { showVpnConflictDialog = false }) { Text("取消") }
481	                        }
482	                    )
483	                }
484	
485	                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
486	
487	                // 操作按钮
488	                Button(
489	                    onClick = {
490	                        if (selectedIndex !in configs.indices) return@Button
491	                        val cfg = configs[selectedIndex]
492	                        scope.launch {
493	                            isLoading = true
494	                            saveCurrentConfig()
495	                            if (!isRunning) {
496	                                if (cfg.networkName.isBlank()) {
497	                                    isLoading = false
498	                                    showToast("请先填写网络名称")
499	                                    return@launch
500	                                }
501	                                if (!cfg.dhcp && cfg.ipv4.isBlank()) {
502	                                    cfg.dhcp = true
503	                                    saveConfigs()
504	                                    forceRecompose()
505	                                    LogService.warn("检测到旧配置缺少静态 IPv4，已自动回退为 DHCP", source = "NetworkConfig")
506	                                    showToast("检测到旧配置缺少静态 IPv4，已自动切回 DHCP")
507	                                }
508	
509	                                if (!cfg.noTun && EasyTierService.isVpnInUseByOther(cfg.instanceName)) {
510	                                    isLoading = false
511	                                    showVpnConflictDialog = true
512	                                    return@launch
513	                                }
514	                            }
515	                            if (isRunning) {
516	                                val result = EasyTierService.stopNetwork(cfg.instanceName)
517	                                if (runtimeState.activeVpnInstanceName == cfg.instanceName) {
518	                                    EasyTierService.stopVpnService(context, cfg.instanceName)
519	                                }
520	                                if (result.success) {
521	                                    isRunning = false
522	                                    cfg.isRunning = false
523	                                    nodes = emptyList()
524	                                    forceRecompose()
525	                                }
526	                                isLoading = false
527	                            } else {
528	                                val result = EasyTierService.startNetwork(cfg)
529	                                if (!result.success) {
530	                                    isLoading = false
531	                                    showToast("启动失败: ${result.errorMessage}")
532	                                    return@launch
533	                                }
534	
535	                                isRunning = true
536	                                cfg.isRunning = true
537	                                forceRecompose()
538	                                LogService.info("网络已启动，等待 IP 分配", source = "NetworkConfig")
539	
540	                                if (cfg.noTun) {
541	                                    isLoading = false
542	                                    showToast("网络已启动（禁用 TUN）")
543	                                    return@launch
544	                                }
545	
546	                                var assignedIp = if (!cfg.dhcp && cfg.ipv4.isNotBlank()) {
547	                                    NetworkConfig.vpnIpv4Address(cfg.ipv4)
548	                                } else {
549	                                    ""
550	                                }
551	                                var routes = mutableListOf<String>()
552	                                val attempts = if (assignedIp.isEmpty()) 20 else 5
553	                                repeat(attempts) {
554	                                    val currentNodes = EasyTierService.collectNodeInfos(cfg.instanceName)
555	                                    val localNode = currentNodes.find { it.isLocal }
556	                                    if (localNode != null && localNode.virtualIp.isNotEmpty()) {
557	                                        assignedIp = localNode.virtualIp
558	                                    }
559	                                    val jsonStr = EasyTierService.collectNetworkInfoJson()
560	                                    if (jsonStr != null) {
561	                                        routes = collectProxyCidrsFromJson(jsonStr, cfg.instanceName).toMutableList()
562	                                    }
563	                                    if (assignedIp.isNotEmpty()) {
564	                                        return@repeat
565	                                    }
566	                                    delay(300)
567	                                }
568	
569	                                LogService.info("分配的 IP: $assignedIp, 路由: $routes", source = "NetworkConfig")
570	                                if (assignedIp.isEmpty()) {
571	                                    val stopResult = EasyTierService.stopNetwork(cfg.instanceName)
572	                                    isLoading = false
573	                                    isRunning = false
574	                                    cfg.isRunning = false
575	                                    nodes = emptyList()
576	                                    forceRecompose()
577	                                    if (!stopResult.success) {
578	                                        LogService.warn("未拿到虚拟 IP，回滚实例失败: ${stopResult.errorMessage}", source = "NetworkConfig")
579	                                    }
580	                                    showToast("未拿到本机虚拟 IP，请检查 DHCP/静态 IP、网络名称和入口服务器后重试")
581	                                    return@launch
582	                                }
583	
584	                                val intent = VpnService.prepare(context)
585	                                if (intent != null) {
586	                                    startPendingConfig = cfg
587	                                    startPendingIp = assignedIp
588	                                    startPendingRoutes = routes
589	                                    vpnPermissionLauncher.launch(intent)
590	                                    return@launch
591	                                }
592	
593	                                EasyTierService.startVpnService(context, cfg.instanceName, assignedIp, 24, routes)
594	                                isLoading = false
595	                            }
596	                        }
597	                    },
598	                    enabled = !isLoading,
599	                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().height(44.dp),
600	                    colors = if (!isRunning) ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(containerColor = Color(0xFF4CAF50))
601	                             else ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(containerColor = Color(0xFFEF5350))
602	                ) {
603	                    AppIcon(if (!isRunning) AppIcons.Play else AppIcons.Stop, contentDescription = null)
604	                    Spacer(Modifier.width(6.dp))
605	                    Text(
606	                        when {
607	                            isLoading && isRunning -> "停止中..."
608	                            isLoading -> "启动中..."
609	                            !isRunning -> "启动网络"
610	                            else -> "停止网络"
611	                        }
612	                    )
613	                }
614	
615	                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
616	
617	                // 节点监控
618	                if (isRunning) {
619	                    val localNode = nodes.firstOrNull { it.isLocal }
620	
621	                    DirectConnectCard(
622	                        node = localNode,
623	                        onCopyIp = {
624	                            localNode?.virtualIp?.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }?.let(::copyVirtualIp)
625	                        },
626	                        onShareIp = {
627	                            localNode?.takeIf { it.virtualIp.isNotBlank() }?.let(::shareVirtualIp)
628	                        }
629	                    )
630	
631	                    Spacer(Modifier.height(10.dp))
632	
633	                    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
634	                        AppIcon(AppIcons.MonitorHeart, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp))
635	                        Spacer(Modifier.width(6.dp))
636	                        Text("节点监测", fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
637	                        CircularProgressIndicator(modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp), strokeWidth = 2.dp)
638	                        Spacer(Modifier.width(6.dp))
639	                        Text("实时", fontSize = 12.sp, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
640	                    }
641	                    Spacer(Modifier.height(6.dp))
642	                    if (nodes.isEmpty()) {
643	                        Card(colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface)) {
644	                            Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(18.dp), contentAlignment = Alignment.Center) {
645	                                Text("等待节点数据...", color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
646	                            }
647	                        }
648	                    } else {
649	                        nodes.forEach { node -> NodeInfoCard(node = node) }
650	                    }
651	                }
652	
653	                Spacer(Modifier.height(16.dp))
654	            }
655	        }
656	    }
657	}

662	}

664	@Composable
665	private fun CustomSwitch(label: String, value: Boolean, onChanged: (Boolean) -> Unit) {
666	    Row(
667	        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(vertical = 4.dp),
668	        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
669	    ) {
670	        Text(label, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
671	        Switch(checked = value, onCheckedChange = onChanged)
672	    }
673	}
674	
675	@Composable
676	private fun CustomSwitch(label: String, hint: String, value: Boolean, onChanged: (Boolean) -> Unit) {
677	    Row(
678	        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(vertical = 4.dp),
679	        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
680	    ) {
681	        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
682	            Text(label)
683	            Text(hint, fontSize = 11.sp, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
684	        }
685	        Switch(checked = value, onCheckedChange = onChanged)
686	    }
687	}

689	@Composable
690	private fun DirectConnectCard(
691	    node: NodeInfo?,
692	    onCopyIp: () -> Unit,
693	    onShareIp: () -> Unit
694	) {
695	    Card(
696	        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
697	            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
698	        )
699	    ) {
700	        Column(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(10.dp)) {
701	            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
702	                AppIcon(AppIcons.Lan, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp))
703	                Spacer(Modifier.width(6.dp))
704	                Text("本机直连地址", fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold, modifier = Modifier.weight(1f))
705	                if (!node?.virtualIp.isNullOrBlank()) {
706	                    TextButton(onClick = onCopyIp) {
707	                        AppIcon(AppIcons.Copy, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp))
708	                        Spacer(Modifier.width(4.dp))
709	                        Text("复制")
710	                    }
711	                    TextButton(onClick = onShareIp) {
712	                        AppIcon(AppIcons.Share, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp))
713	                        Spacer(Modifier.width(4.dp))
714	                        Text("分享")
715	                    }
716	                }
717	            }
718	
719	            Spacer(Modifier.height(6.dp))
720	
721	            if (node?.virtualIp.isNullOrBlank()) {
722	                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
723	                    CircularProgressIndicator(modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp), strokeWidth = 2.dp)
724	                    Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
725	                    Text(
726	                        "网络已启动，正在获取本机虚拟 IP...",
727	                        fontSize = 12.sp,
728	                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
729	                    )
730	                }
731	            } else {
732	                val virtualIp = node?.virtualIp.orEmpty()
733	                val hostname = node?.hostname.orEmpty()
734	
735	                Text(
736	                    "可复制当前虚拟 IP，在需要手动直连的场景中使用。",
737	                    fontSize = 12.sp,
738	                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
739	                )
740	                Spacer(Modifier.height(6.dp))
741	                SelectionContainer {
742	                    Text(
743	                        text = virtualIp,
744	                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
745	                        fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace,
746	                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
747	                    )
748	                }
749	                Spacer(Modifier.height(3.dp))
750	                Text(
751	                    text = "设备名: ${hostname.ifEmpty { "本机" }}",
752	                    fontSize = 12.sp,
753	                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
754	                )
755	            }
756	        }
757	    }
758	}
